title: Falling Gravel Remover
description: Removes Falling Gravel From The Game to Reduce Lag 📈
body:
**Gravel FPS Fix** 🪨⚡
Tired of your game lagging when huge amounts of gravel start falling? This mod fixes that!

Instead of spawning hundreds of falling block entities that tank your FPS, this mod instantly deletes falling gravel, keeping your game smooth and playable.

✨ Features
Automatically removes falling gravel before it spawns as an entity.

Great for players with weaker PCs or modpacks with large mining/explosions.

Simple, lightweight, and server-friendly.

📌 Use Cases
Mining gravel-heavy caves without lag.

Large TNT explosions that cause gravel collapses.

Smooth performance in modded servers.

🔧 Compatibility
Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Should be compatible with most mods (since it only targets falling gravel entities).
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1748a492ded335ca2d7d819efa3b06126e095628.gif)

**With the Gravel remover off:**
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d02e6076e00529edeecf1c34e7fca74c93a4129.png)

**With the Gravel remover on:**
![áfter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c3e72184433aa0f3c098bd0091786b7a4dab380.png)

**HOW DOES IT WORK ?**
Place the FPS crystal in a loaded chunk. He will not work if the chunk is not loaded
Download ( Chunk Loaders ) 📈
“After you place the FPS crystal, it will remove every gravel block that falls!”

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e358674c203dc2f67b0d2becbb832dcceb3be791.png)
